name: Pure Market Making
description: Place bid/ask orders simultaneously to earn spread. Basic MM strategy
summary: Places buy and sell orders around the current price to profit from the bid-ask spread. Requires high liquidity.

name: Avellaneda Market Making
description: Optimal quoting based on Avellaneda-Stoikov model with inventory risk management
summary: Automatically adjusts buy/sell spread based on how much inventory you hold. Smarter risk-aware market making.

name: Cross-Exchange Market Making
description: Market make on one exchange, hedge on another. Cross-exchange spread capture
summary: Provides liquidity on one exchange while hedging risk on another. Captures the price gap between exchanges.

name: Perpetual Market Making
description: Market making specifically for perpetual futures markets
summary: Places buy and sell orders on perpetual futures markets. Earns spread while factoring in funding rate costs.

name: AMM Arbitrage
description: Arbitrage price differences between DEX (AMM) and CEX
summary: Buys on a decentralized exchange and sells on a centralized one (or vice versa) when prices diverge.

name: Spot-Perpetual Arbitrage
description: Arbitrage funding rate between spot and perpetual futures
summary: Earns funding payments by holding opposite positions in spot and futures when funding rates are high.

name: Hedge
summary: Automatically mirrors trades across exchanges to stay market-neutral. Reduces directional risk on open positions.

name: Liquidity Mining
description: Order placement optimized for exchange liquidity reward programs
summary: Places orders to earn exchange reward tokens while making a market. Optimized for liquidity mining campaigns.

name: Cross-Exchange Mining
description: Arbitrage across exchanges with automatic rebalancing, slippage buffers, and fee accounting
summary: Buys on one exchange and sells on another when price differences appear. Auto-rebalances and accounts for fees.

name: Funding Rate Arbitrage (V2)
description: Exploit funding rate differentials between perp exchanges. Long/short across two connectors
summary: Goes long on one futures exchange and short on another to collect funding rate differences. Market-neutral profit.

name: Simple PMM (V2)
description: Lightweight pure market making. Buy/sell around mid price, refresh at intervals
summary: Beginner-friendly market making that places buy and sell orders around the current price. Simple setup, quick start.

name: Simple VWAP Execution
description: VWAP execution — break large orders into smaller pieces to minimize market impact
summary: Splits large orders into small pieces over time to avoid moving the market. Reduces slippage on big trades.

name: Simple XEMM (V2)
description: Simplified cross-exchange MM. Limit orders on maker, hedge fills on taker
summary: Makes a market on one exchange and instantly hedges fills on another. Simplified cross-exchange spread capture.
